operation.name: Insert
operation.sql: INSERT INTO user_operation_results (user_id, operation_id, op_type, status, pts, pts_count, payload_hash, response_schema_version, response_codec, response_payload, response_payload_hash, terminal_error_code) VALUES (:user_id, :operation_id, :op_type, :status, :pts, :pts_count, :payload_hash, :response_schema_version, :response_codec, :response_payload, :response_payload_hash, :terminal_error_code)

operation.name: SelectByOperation
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, operation_id, op_type, status, pts, pts_count, payload_hash, response_schema_version, response_codec, response_payload, response_payload_hash, terminal_error_code FROM user_operation_results WHERE user_id = :user_id AND operation_id = :operation_id LIMIT 1

operation.name: SelectByStatusCreatedBefore
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, operation_id, op_type, status, pts, pts_count, payload_hash, response_schema_version, response_codec, response_payload, response_payload_hash, terminal_error_code FROM user_operation_results WHERE status = :status AND created_at < :beforeCreatedAt ORDER BY created_at LIMIT :limit
